name: Dak Prescott
title: NFL Quarterback
bio: American professional football quarterback for the Dallas Cowboys. Two-time Pro Bowl selection known for his leadership both on and off the field.
faith: Prescott has been open about his Christian faith, particularly after the death of his mother and brother. He has said, 'I know God has a plan for me' and credits his faith with helping him through immense personal tragedy.

sources.title: Dak Prescott — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the Dallas Cowboys quarterback

sources.title: Dak Prescott on Faith, Family, and Football
sources.note: How Prescott leaned on his Christian faith after the deaths of his mother and brother

sources.title: Dak Prescott: 'God Has a Plan for Me'
sources.note: Prescott discusses his faith and how it sustains him through personal tragedy and professional challenges

tagline: Overcame tragedy with faith and became a voice for Christ in the NFL
